questions.question: What low voltage services does Polos Electronics provide?
questions.answer: We provide comprehensive low voltage electrical services including security system installation, surveillance cameras, home theater setup, whole house audio, networking and structured cabling, Starlink satellite internet installation, door access control systems, and cable management. We serve both residential and commercial customers.

questions.question: What areas does Polos Electronics serve?
questions.answer: Our primary service area includes Clark, Cowlitz, and Skamania counties in Southwest Washington. We are based in Battle Ground, WA and regularly serve Vancouver, Camas, Woodland, and Longview. We are licensed to work throughout Washington state and travel statewide for larger projects.

questions.question: Is Polos Electronics licensed and insured?
questions.answer: Yes, Polos Electronics is fully licensed and insured. We have been a trusted low voltage electrical contractor since 1979, serving Southwest Washington for over 45 years. Our technicians are trained and experienced in all aspects of low voltage installation and repair.

questions.question: How do I get a free estimate?
questions.answer: Contact us by phone at (360) 687-3543 or use the contact form on our website. We will discuss your project needs and schedule a convenient time to provide a free estimate. We respond to inquiries promptly and are happy to answer any questions about your project.

questions.question: Can you install Starlink satellite internet?
questions.answer: Yes, we are experienced Starlink installers. We handle professional mounting of the Starlink dish, proper cable routing into your home or business, network configuration, and can integrate Starlink with your existing home network. Contact us to schedule your Starlink installation.

questions.question: Do you install residential security systems?
questions.answer: Yes, we install complete residential security systems including alarm systems, motion sensors, door and window sensors, and video surveillance. We also offer commercial security installations. All our security work includes professional setup and configuration for reliable operation.

questions.question: Do you serve both residential and commercial customers?
questions.answer: Absolutely. We provide low voltage electrical services for both residential homes and commercial businesses. Whether you need home theater installation, business security cameras, office networking, or any other low voltage work, Polos Electronics has the experience to complete your project professionally.
